title: La abuelita
description: This is a mod that adds a charming structure to the overworld: a small house inhabited by a grandmother who sells valuable items.
body:
What is it about?

This is a mod that adds a charming structure to the overworld: a small house inhabited by a grandmother who sells valuable items. Embark on an adventure to find this structure and trade with the grandmother.

Content

+ 1 Structure + 1 villager profession + 1 item + 1 recipe

How to find the structure

The structure is very, very rare to find. If you want to locate it much faster, you can craft a wand made of cookies that will guide you to the nearest structure. To use it, you should have the wand in your main hand and right-click. The wand will consume cookies from your off-hand. There is a better wand, it's way safer than the normal one.

The structure
